_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: If stablecoin growth continues and fear begins to lift, the market should transition from Anxiety into early Disbelief as price recovers but skepticism persists.
next_move.brains_agree: No — the analyst defaults to HOLD while the narrative writer leans bullish on accumulation; consensus splits the difference with a cautious LONG.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed climbs above 40 with btc_momentum_30d breaking above 55 and stablecoin growth sustaining positive
next_move.invalidated_if: fear_greed drops below 25 with btc_momentum_30d falling below 35 and funding turning negative
